chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CP No.D-8284 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.4913/2023. 2. For hearing of CMA No.31502/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 01.10.2025. Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, DAG. Mr. Muhammad Wasif, Advocate for the Respondents No.1 & 3. --------------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order sheet reflects that this was also the case on the previous date and that the matter has not been pursued over a protracted period despite a note of caution having been recorded on 22.08.2025, suggesting that the Petitioner has lost interest. The Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
